problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
hypothesis: If Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
